data.title: Coinbase CEO Calls 4 Billion People “Unbrokered” and Wants to Fix It
data.description:
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong unveils a policy blueprint to bring 4 billion adults into capital markets through blockchain tokenization, arguing that geographic barriers and legacy infrastructure costs have systematically excluded two-thirds of the global population from wealth-building opportunities.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-ceo-calls-4-billion-people-unbrokered-and-wants-to-fix-it/

data.title: Bermuda Partners With Circle and Coinbase To Become World’s First ‘On-Chain Economy’
data.description:
The Government of Bermuda says it plans to transform the island into what it calls the world’s first fully on-chain national economy, in partnership with stablecoin issuer Circle and US-based crypto exchange Coinbase.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/20/bermuda-partners-with-circle-and-coinbase-to-become-worlds-first-on-chain-economy/

data.title: Chainlink Expands Data Streams to Bring U.S. Equities Onchain
data.description:
Chainlink has officially expanded its Data Streams product to cover the U. S. equities market, a segment estimated at $80 trillion. The update enables decentralized finance platforms to access real-time price data for stocks and ETFs across pre-market, after-hours, and overnight sessions, narrowing the gap between continuous blockchain operations and traditional market schedules
source: https://www.ethnews.com/chainlink-expands-data-streams-to-bring-u-s-equities-onchain/

data.title: CFTC Appoints Michael Passalacqua as Senior Counsel for Cryptocurrency Oversight
data.description: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has appointed Michael Passalacqua as senior counsel, highlighting its ongoing focus on cryptocurrency regulation. According to NS3.AI, Passalacqua is a lawyer with expertise in cryptocurrency litigation, having previously worked at Simpson Thacher & Bartlett where he concentrated on blockchain and crypto-related legal cases. This appointment underscores the CFTC's commitment to strengthening its regulatory oversight in the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: USDT Prices in Venezuela Decline Amid Economic Optimism
data.description: USDT prices in Venezuela have decreased by over 40%, aligning more closely with the Central Bank's official exchange rate. According to NS3.AI, this drop is attributed to market optimism regarding increased foreign currency availability, following recent U.S. political intervention and new oil agreements. Despite this price correction, analysts warn that inflation and living costs remain elevated. They emphasize that without ongoing foreign investment, the current economic stabilization could be short-lived.

data.title: Schwab Report Highlights Cryptocurrency Value Concentration in Network Layer
data.description: Schwab's latest report categorizes cryptocurrencies into three distinct layers: networks, infrastructure, and products. According to NS3.AI, the analysis reveals that the majority of value is concentrated in the foundational network layer. This insight underscores the significance of focusing on core blockchain networks when considering digital asset investments.

data.title: CFTC Unveils 'Future Proof' Plan for Digital Asset Regulation
data.description:
CFTC Chair Michael Selig announces the 'Future Proof' initiative to modernize crypto regulations, aiming for minimum effective oversight.
source: https://coincu.com/news/cftc-future-proof-digital-assets/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Suggests Integrating Decentralized Validator Technology into Ethereum
data.description: Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed the integration of Decentralized Validator Technology (DVT) directly into the Ethereum protocol. According to NS3.AI, DVT involves multiple operators managing validator execution rather than relying on a single node, which enhances both decentralization and security. However, current implementations encounter challenges such as complex setups and susceptibility to quantum computing threats. Buterin believes that native integration into Ethereum could address these issues and bolster staking security.

data.title: Massachusetts Court Halts Kalshi's Sports Prediction Markets
data.description: A Massachusetts judge has issued a preliminary injunction against Kalshi, mandating the cessation of its sports-related prediction markets in the state. According to NS3.AI, Kalshi argues that its event contracts are not sports bets and fall under federal regulation by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), rather than state gambling laws. This ruling represents the first court order of its kind against a prediction market platform in the United States and may signal potential similar actions against other platforms, such as Polymarket.

data.title: RedStone Acquires Security Token Market and Conference Business
data.description: RedStone, a provider of oracle solutions, has acquired the Security Token Market platform along with its conference business. According to NS3.AI, this acquisition allows RedStone to access data from more than 800 tokenized real-world asset products, which include stocks, real estate, bonds, and funds. Additionally, the deal includes the rights to the STM tokenization conference brand.

data.title: TRON DAO Enhances Security with Blockaid Integration
data.description: TRON DAO has integrated Blockaid's advanced security tools to enhance transaction safety and detect risks in decentralized applications across its network. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration aims to protect over 358 million users from malicious activities as the TRON ecosystem continues to expand globally. The partnership highlights a move towards proactive security measures within blockchain environments, aiming to build trust and secure interactions in decentralized finance.

data.title: Amazon CEO Says Trump Tariffs Has Started Rise Prices
data.description:
Amazon CEO Andy Jassy said President Trump’s trade tariffs have started to be reflected in the price of some items, as sellers weigh how to absorb the shock of the added costs.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/amazon-ceo-says-trump-tariffs-has-started-rise-prices/

data.title: Real Finance adopts Tharwa’s new thUSD stablecoin
data.description:
RWA issuer THARWA will integrate its stablecoin, thUSD, into the Real Finance ecosystem. Real Finance is a fast-growing DeFi blockchain, seeking tools for sustainable on-chain yield. Real Finance will launch its thUSD stablecoin on the Real Finance ecosystem. Tharwa has created a real-world asset-backed stablecoin, which will be added to the growing DeFi blockchain and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/real-finance-adopts-tharwa-thusd-stablecoin/
